detail.description:
Do you like defense games?

The hit webtoon “66,666 Years: Advent of the Dark Mage”
has arrived as a mobile roguelike defense RPG!

Experience the world and characters from the original webtoon,
combine powerful magic and heroes, and defend the battlefield against endless enemies!

Join the Dark Mage who awakens after 66,666 years
and dive into the ultimate strategy defense experience!
Feel the thrill of combat and the excitement of endless growth!

🎮 Game Features

▶ Strategic Defense Action!
detail.recentChanges:
[New Update]
- Max Level expanded to 100
- 300 new stages added (Basic Mission / Elite Mission / Infinite Mage Tower, 100 each)
- New Refining Stone Step-Up Package added

[Bug Fixes]
- Fixed several skill and option errors
